rows.question: 项目编号（贵司内部机会/项目代码）
国家/地区（及省、州等，如适用）
本表全部金额统一采用的币种（ISO 4217，如 CNY、USD）
访谈或现场踏勘日期
项目地理范围：覆盖哪些城市、区县、道路或园区？边界如何界定？
rows.answer: 重庆两江新区、江北区、渝北区部分主干道、次干道及产业园区道路

rows.question: 项目性质：新建、既有灯具改造、扩建，还是纯运维升级？
rows.unit: 新建 / 改造 / 扩建 / 纯运维升级

rows.question: 计划涉及的灯具总数量？其中将改造或新建的盏数？
本市或本区域现状路灯总保有量大约多少？
现状灯具类型及大致占比？（如高压钠、普通 LED、太阳能、装饰灯等）
现有灯具大致服役年限？是否大量临近寿命末期？故障或报废压力？
在上述照明支出中，年度电费约为多少？
年度运维支出（人工、材料、外包运维等）约为多少？
年度设备购置或更换预算约为多少？（可按年度或按项目）
人工巡检相关费用每年约为多少？（可含编制、频次）
客户当前是否为软件平台、系统运维或数据服务付费？
rows.unit: 是/否；若为是写明本币/年

rows.question: 近三年照明相关总支出变化趋势？
rows.unit: 上升 / 下降 / 持平（简述原因）

rows.question: 若为**单一电价**：在此填写**平均到户电价**（本币/kWh）。若为**分时（峰谷）**或**多段电价**：可填**综合均价**（若可知），并务必完成 **C4a–C4e** 分项。
rows.unit: 本币/kWh（综合均价；细节见 C4a–e）

rows.question: 照明相关用电的**计费方式**是？
rows.unit: 单一电价 / 分时（峰谷） / 多段或其它

rows.question: **峰段**（或最高阶梯）**到户电价**（本币/kWh）？不适用填 N/A。
**谷段到户电价**（本币/kWh）？不适用填 N/A。
**平段/腰峰**到户电价（本币/kWh）？无则填 N/A。
每晚开灯小时数？若有季节性差异请说明。
年度运维外包合同金额（如有）？
每年人工巡检轮次？每轮约人次、车·日？
每年故障或报修工单大约多少起？
若采用常规并网方案，是否需要电缆沟开挖与敷设？
电缆沟开挖每公里的大致单价？
传统做法下，单套路灯综合造价（含杆、灯具、基础、线缆、人工等）？
客户是否存在财政紧张、预算冻结或延期付款？
本项目照明资产（或明确子集）是否已处于 **EMC/合同能源管理、节能绩效、ESCO 或类似第三方服务合同** 之下？
rows.unit: 全覆盖 / 仅部分 / 无 / 未知

rows.question: 若为「全覆盖」或「仅部分」：**剩余合同期**大约多少年？不适用填 0。
在现有合同下，**主要商务/对价机制**是？（选最接近的一项）
rows.unit: 节能分享 / 保证节能量 / 固定托管或管理费 / 租赁 / 混合或其它（说明）

rows.question: 在**现状合同**下，**市电电费**由谁承担（可归因于本批路灯的部分）？
rows.unit: 业主/政府方 / ESCO或承包商 / 分摊或转付 / 不清楚

rows.question: 现有合同中是否有**重要约束**？（买断/提前终止、排他、节能基准锁定、分享上限、转付规则等）
rows.answer: 需核实年度预算审批、存量运维外包范围、政府采购流程、节能基准、资产入账及提前终止条件

rows.question: 客户是否要求灯具资产必须登记在其名下？
客户可接受的合同年限？
能否接受“客户享有使用权、我方保留资产所有权”的结构？
rows.unit: 接受 / 拒绝 / 未决

rows.question: 合同结束后，最能接受的资产处置方式？（无偿移交、折价回购、续约、我方拆回等）
rows.unit: 移交 / 回购 / 续约 / 拆回

rows.question: Project / opportunity ID (your internal code)
Country — and province/state if applicable
Currency for ALL monetary answers on this form (ISO 4217, e.g. CNY, USD)
Interview / site visit date
Which city, district, roads or campus does this project cover? What is the exact scope?
rows.answer: Selected main roads, secondary roads, and industrial-park roads in Liangjiang New Area, Jiangbei, and Yubei

rows.question: Is this project new installation, retrofit of existing lights, expansion, or pure O&M upgrade?
How many lights are planned in total? How many will actually be retrofitted or newly installed?
What is the total installed stock of street lights in this city / region?
What types of fixtures are currently installed? (HPS, standard LED, solar, decorative — and approximate mix %)
How old are the existing fixtures? Are many approaching end-of-life?
Of that total, how much is the annual electricity bill?
How much is spent on maintenance and O&M annually?
How much is budgeted for equipment purchase or replacement?
How much is spent on manual inspection labour?
rows.unit: Headcount / frequency / local currency per year

rows.question: Does the client currently pay for a software platform, system maintenance, or data service?
rows.unit: Yes / No; local currency / year if yes

rows.question: Has the total lighting spend trended up, down, or flat over the past three years?

If billing is **flat / single-rate**: state the **average effective tariff** here (local currency per kWh). If **time-of-use (TOU)** or **multi-tier**: give a **blended average** if known, and complete **C4a–C4e** below for peak/off-peak (and shoulder) detail.
rows.unit: Local currency / kWh (effective average; detail in C4a–e)

rows.question: What is the **electricity billing type** for lighting-related consumption?
rows.unit: Flat (single rate) / Time-of-use (TOU) / Multi-tier or other (describe)

rows.question: **Peak** (or highest tier) **electricity price** per kWh — use when TOU or peak tier applies; otherwise enter N/A.
**Off-peak** **electricity price** per kWh — use when TOU applies; otherwise enter N/A.
**Shoulder / mid-peak** **electricity price** per kWh — if your utility uses three or more periods; otherwise enter N/A.
How many hours per night are the lights currently on?
What is the total annual O&M contract value?
How many manual inspection rounds are done per year? How many person-days and vehicle-days per round?
How many fault / repair tickets are generated per year?
If using a conventional grid-connected solution, would trenching and cable laying be required?
What is the approximate cost of cable trenching per kilometre?
What is the all-in cost per conventional streetlight? (Including pole, fixture, foundation, cable, labour)
Is the client under fiscal stress, budget freezes, or deferred-payment situations?
Is **this lighting portfolio** (or a defined subset) currently covered by an **EMC, energy performance contracting, ESCO, or similar third-party service contract**?
rows.unit: Yes (whole portfolio) / Partial (subset only) / No / Unknown

rows.question: If **Yes** or **Partial** — what is the **approximate remaining contract term**?
If under contract — what is the **primary payment / revenue mechanic**? (pick closest)
rows.unit: Shared savings / Guaranteed savings / Fixed fee or management fee / Lease or rental / Mixed or other (describe)

rows.question: Under the **current** arrangement, **who pays grid electricity** attributable to these lights?
rows.unit: Owner or public client pays / ESCO or contractor pays / Shared or pass-through / Unclear

rows.question: Any **material contractual constraints**? (buyout or early termination, exclusivity, baseline frozen for savings, gain-sharing caps, pass-through rules)
rows.unit: Text — list key clauses or “none known”
rows.answer: Verify annual budget approval, existing O&M scope, procurement process, energy baseline, asset registration, and early-termination conditions

rows.question: Does the client require that the assets must be owned by them?
What contract length is acceptable to the client?
Would the client accept a structure where they have usage rights but we retain ownership?
What asset disposal method at contract end is most acceptable to the client? (Free transfer / Discounted buyout / Renewal / We retrieve)
